tasks.question: Locate the central check-in verification endpoint that writes Log records, marks tickets as used, updates subTickets, and may enqueue Printer jobs.

query_variants.question: Locate the central check-in verification endpoint that writes Log records, marks tickets as used, updates subTickets, and may enqueue Printer jobs.

Locate the Koa router endpoint for check-in verification. Search for router.post('/add'), ctx.db.models.Log, ticketStatus, subTickets, and Printer job creation. Return only exact implementation file-line citations.

Find the file and line range that implements check-in log creation: creates a Log record, marks the ticket as used, updates subTickets, and optionally enqueues Printer work. Prefer primary source files and cite the exact handler range.
